title: SOL 15pk Tea Light Candles Fresh Berries – 3.5 Hour Burn Time, Scented Tea Lights, Long-Lasting and Ideal for Home, Relaxation, Romantic Dinners, Weddings, Festive Decor, Cosy Evenings
features: Relaxing Scent – Enjoy the refreshing aroma of fresh berries! These scented tea light candles create a soothing and inviting atmosphere, lifting your mood and filling your space with a delightful, fruity fragrance.

Long-Burning Scented Candles Tea Lights – Each candle tea light burns for approximately 3.5 hours, offering a delightful fragrance and a warm glow, making every pack a fantastic option for relaxation and ambiance.
Decorative Piece – These tea lights scented will not only perfume your home but also enhance the ambience of any room with their vibrant red hue and welcoming aroma.
Provide Beautiful Light – Designed to emit a soft, warm glow, these t lights fit perfectly into any classic tea light holders, adding both light and elegance to your space.
Ideal Gift – Carefully packaged, our 15-pack tea lights candles scented are perfect for gifting on special occasions like Christmas, weddings, housewarmings, birthdays, or any celebration.
